T0066.title: Resold Data
T0066.definition: In illicit data trading, personal or organizational data that has been resold one or more times, also known as 'historical material.' Compared to first-hand data, second-hand material may suffer from incompleteness, inaccuracy, or tampering due to multiple transfers, and its value is typically lower.
